name: hermes-relay-for-chrome
description: Browser-native capture, memory, and AI context handoff for Hermes Agent.

scripts.check:js: node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content/chat.js && node --check extension/popup/popup.js && node --check extension/sidepanel/sidepanel.js
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run check:js
